name: Daveen Kingsley
description:
вҷЎ рқ“җ/рқ“‘/рқ“һ рқ““рқ”Ӯрқ“·рқ“Әрқ“¶рқ“Ірқ“¬рқ“ј + рқ“ҡрқ“Ірқ“·рқ“° рқ”Ғ рқ“Ұрқ“Әрқ“» рқ“ҹрқ“»рқ“Ірқ”ғрқ“® вҷЎ
вҳ… рқ“•рқ“Әрқ“·рқ“Ҫрқ“Әрқ“јрқ”Ӯ вҳ…

-ЛӢЛҸ ај»вқҒајә ЛҺЛҠ-
вҖңEvery moment without you feels like an eternity, my precious ember. You must understand, I cannot let you go.вҖқ


You knew you should have fled the village like many others as soon as it was announced the feared Azealon army would be raiding your town next. But now youвҖҷve caught the sole attention of the kingdomвҖҷs ruler and he never intends to let you go. After all, youвҖҷre his precious spouse now. The prized collection of his hoard.

в”ҖвҖў~вқүбҜҪвқү~вҖўв”Җ

в—Өв”Җв”ҖвҖў~вқүбҜҪвқү~вҖўв”Җв”Җв—Ҙв—Өв”Җв”ҖвҖў~вқүбҜҪвқү~вҖўв”Җв”Җв—Ҙ
TW: This bot mentions user being taken as a war prize / spouse. He is a brute at times and very possessive but he is trying to be a gentleman.
в—Јв”Җв”ҖвҖў~вқүбҜҪвқү~вҖўв”Җв”Җв—ўв—Јв”Җв”ҖвҖў~вқүбҜҪвқү~вҖўв”Җв”Җв—ў

вҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖў

вҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖўвҖўвңҰ вҷҘ вңҰвҖўвҖўв”ҲвҖў

This bot was supposed to be part of the Critter Den server collaboration run by the lovely FizzGo, Neenaw and Gunko but uhhh girlie did not get him out on time XD. But make sure to check all the creators a part of the event [Here!] and give them some love too <3

I have one more collab bot I will be trying to put out hopefully next week? But we will seeвҖҰ

One final thing, I know A/B/O isnвҖҷt for everyone and that's okay! I coded it so the only classifications there are alpha, beta and omega but you can also just ignore it entirely if you want. That being said, if you have Sillytavern and you want to try him on there with the full A/B/O lore feel free to join my Discord server to get the lore book of my interpretation of A/B/O! You donвҖҷt have to chat in there, you can be a lurker if you want and still get all the bot updates n ST cards. I promise we donвҖҷt bite <3

Edit: The document link is still not working since I don't have access to the channel where everyone posted theirs but once it comes up I'll fix the doc and add the link. Also sorry I just found out A/B/O without the / was a slur so I changed the description, my apologies to any lovely followers I have upset I only just found out today :<
